description: Language support for GPPL (General Post Processor Language) — syntax highlighting, diagnostics, IntelliSense, and more.
configuration.title: GPPL
configuration.trace.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the GPPL language server.
configuration.encoding.description: Target ANSI encoding for GPPL files. Characters not representable in this encoding will be flagged.
configuration.encoding.windows1252: Western European (default for most SolidCAM installations)
command.openLogs.title: Open Server Logs
